name: Glaze for Pistachio Whiskey Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons to 4 tablespoons Milk or light cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the sugar, vanilla, butter and milk in a bowl until smooth.
2. Pour the glaze over the cake.
3. Decorate with green and red sprinkles if desired.
Nutritional info per serving: 63 calories, .1g protein, 13g carbohydrates, 2g fat (21%)
